tender.description: Shifting of 3P Structure of 11 mtr long PCC Pole infront of H.No. 18SP and 2 Nos. 9 mtr. long PCC pole infront of H.No. 178 in Sector 1 and 4 at Hisar. Rates taken in DNIT are excluding GST.
